page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Predictors of lesion location and postsurgical seizure freedom in focal cortical dysplasia.

Website for Multi-centre Epilepsy Lesion Detection (MELD) Project.

Updates from the Multi-centre Epilepsy Lesion Detection (MELD) Project.

The Multi-centre Epilepsy Lesion Detection (MELD) project is an international collaboration dedicated to improving the detection of lesions in patients with drug-resistant epilepsy.
